title: geissorhiza outeniquensis
intro: Geissorhiza outeniquensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as a type of irid. It is native to South Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, providing benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Geissorhiza outeniquensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, with the root being used to make a herbal tea or added to other remedies.
